name: ◁ Lemony Bean Salad
servings: prep time: 10 minutes, plus 30 minutes chilling

ingredients.item:
BEAN SALAD
38 ounces (1.1 kg) mixed canned beans, drained and rinsed
1 cup (50 g) finely chopped parsley
ingredients.original:
BEAN SALAD
38 ounces (1.1 kg) mixed canned beans, drained and rinsed
1 cup (50 g) finely chopped parsley

ingredients.item:
DRESSING
1/3 cup (80 ml) fresh lemon juice, plus more if needed
½ cup (120 ml) olive oil
ingredients.original:
DRESSING
1/3 cup (80 ml) fresh lemon juice, plus more if needed
½ cup (120 ml) olive oil

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE BEAN SALAD: Place the beans in a medium salad bowl. Add the parsley, tomatoes, and onion.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE BEAN SALAD: Place the beans in a medium salad bowl. Add the parsley, tomatoes, and onion.

ingredients.item: 2 TO MAKE THE DRESSING: In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, oil, salt, and pepper.
ingredients.original: 2 TO MAKE THE DRESSING: In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, oil, salt, and pepper.

ingredients.item: 3 Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine well. Taste and adjust for more salt and/or lemon juice if needed.
ingredients.original: 3 Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine well. Taste and adjust for more salt and/or lemon juice if needed.

ingredients.item: 4 Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
ingredients.original: 4 Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.

ingredients.item:
FALAFEL
2½ cups (500 g) dried chickpeas
6 cups (1.4 L) cold water
ingredients.original:
FALAFEL
2½ cups (500 g) dried chickpeas
6 cups (1.4 L) cold water

ingredients.item: 2 small yellow onions, cut into quarters
ingredients.original: 2 small yellow onions, cut into quarters

ingredients.item: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro
ingredients.original: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro

ingredients.item: ¾ cup (180 ml) plus 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
ingredients.original: ¾ cup (180 ml) plus 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
